steps.title: Substitute the input
steps.content:
To find the requested function value, substitute the input $20$ for $x$:
$$f(20)=\frac{7}{10}(20)+55$$

steps.title: Evaluate the expression
steps.content:
The multiplication gives $14$, and adding $55$ gives $69$:
$$\frac{7}{10}(20)+55=14+55=69$$
The graph check uses the same input value. The answer is 69.
